insight.headline: Deprecating useBuyerJourneyIntercept
insight.what_changed: The useBuyerJourneyIntercept hook on checkout UI extensions and the block_progress capability are deprecated starting in version 2026-07. Existing extensions will continue to work, but new extensions should not use this hook. The deprecation is part of the checkout UI extensions API version 2026-07.
insight.developer_impact: Developers should stop using the useBuyerJourneyIntercept hook in new checkout UI extensions and update existing extensions to use alternative methods. The block_progress capability will also be removed, so developers should review their code for any dependencies on this capability. The Checkout UI extensions API provides alternative methods for customizing the checkout experience, such as using the Checkout Extensibility API.
insight.merchant_impact: Merchants will not be directly affected by this deprecation, but they may notice changes in the behavior of checkout UI extensions as developers update their code to use alternative methods.
insight.why_it_matters: This deprecation is important because it affects the way developers customize the checkout experience for merchants, and it may require updates to existing extensions to ensure they continue to work as expected.

updates.title: @shopify/cli-hydrogen@13.0.1
updates.summary: Hydrogen CLI has been updated to read disabled command metadata and preserve actionable build errors during deployment.

updates.title: @shopify/create-hydrogen@5.0.38
updates.summary: Create Hydrogen now adds an explicit app alias to new projects, improving JavaScript project configuration.

updates.title: skeleton@2026.4.5
updates.summary: Hydrogen skeleton has been updated to include an explicit app alias in new projects, similar to create Hydrogen.
Shopify CLI version 4.5.0 has been released, unhiding store commands for public release.

updates.title: POS Extensions now supports a background extension target
updates.summary: POS Extensions now support a background extension target, allowing extensions to observe POS events without rendering UI.

updates.title: Identity verification for Shopify Partners starts today
updates.summary: Identity verification for Shopify Partners has started, aiming to increase trust in the partner ecosystem.

updates.title: App Pricing: more plans, no-charge plan testing, and negative and fractional App Events
updates.summary: App Pricing has been updated with more plans, no-charge plan testing, and support for negative and fractional App Events.

updates.title: POS UI extensions 2026-07 uses per-unit fixed-amount line item discounts
updates.summary: POS UI extensions API version 2026-07 now requires per-unit fixed-amount line item discounts.

updates.title: Shopify Flow: Changes to Action extensions result in fewer breaking changes
updates.summary: Shopify Flow now handles breaking changes to Action extensions more gracefully, reducing validation failures.

updates.title: Shopify Flow: Action runtime URLs now update automatically
updates.summary: Shopify Flow now automatically updates Action runtime URLs on every execution, reducing manual updates.
Shopify CLI version 4.4.0 has been released, updating Javy related dependencies and fixing long URL wrapping issues.

updates.title: Updated App Store Requirements: 1.3 Always Use Honest and Transparent Review Practices
updates.summary: App Store Requirements have been updated to emphasize honest and transparent review practices.

recap.headline: Hydrogen and Shopify ecosystem updates with new features and bug fixes

themes.title: Hydrogen Updates
themes.detail: Hydrogen received several updates, including @shopify/cli-hydrogen@13.0.1, @shopify/create-hydrogen@5.0.38, and skeleton@2026.4.5, which fixed bugs and added new features such as explicit ~ app alias to new Hydrogen projects.

themes.title: Shopify Ecosystem Updates
themes.detail: The Shopify ecosystem saw several updates, including the release of CLI 4.5.0, POS Extensions supporting background extension targets, and changes to App Pricing, POS UI extensions, and Shopify Flow, which aim to improve the developer experience and provide more flexibility.

actions.text: Update Hydrogen projects to use the latest version of @shopify/cli-hydrogen and @shopify/create-hydrogen
Review and adapt to the changes in App Pricing, POS UI extensions, and Shopify Flow
